name: L'Ostensoir Quantique
description: Réceptacle géant dont les anneaux concentriques calculent en permanence le destin des atomes. Sa lumière désintègre la matière organique au niveau quantique.
prompt: Massive floating quantum reliquary, concentric rotating rings with glowing binary code, golden holographic light beam disintegrating matter, levitating cyber-monastery relic, pristine white ceramic and dark metal, grimdark sci-fi TCG card art, highly detailed
